ds4-server
Serve one loaded DwarfStar model through OpenAI, Responses, Anthropic, and completion-compatible HTTP APIs.

Usage: ds4-server [options]

Model And Runtime
  -m, --model FILE               GGUF model path. Default: ds4flash.gguf
  --metal | --cuda | --cpu       Select the backend explicitly.
  --backend NAME                 Backend name: metal, cuda, or cpu.
  -c, --ctx N                    Allocated context tokens.
  -n, --tokens N                 Default max output tokens when clients omit a limit.
  -t, --threads N                CPU helper threads for host-side/reference work.
  --power N                      GPU duty-cycle target, 1..100. Default: 100
  --ssd-streaming                Metal/CUDA/ROCm: opt in to SSD-backed model streaming instead of full residency.
  --ssd-streaming-cold           SSD streaming: skip default popularity-based expert-cache preload.
  --ssd-streaming-cache-experts N|NGB
      SSD streaming: routed expert cache as expert count or GiB, e.g. 32GB. Metal/ROCm default: 80% working set minus non-routed weights; CUDA default: backend fixed cache.
  --ssd-streaming-preload-experts N
      SSD streaming: upfront popularity preload count. Default: auto hot seed capped at 4096; use --ssd-streaming-cold to skip.
  --simulate-used-memory NGB     Diagnostic: lock N GiB before model load to simulate a smaller-memory machine.
  --prefill-chunk N              Metal graph prefill chunk size. Default: auto (PRO long prompts use 8192; others use 4096).

HTTP API
  --host HOST                    Bind address. Default: 127.0.0.1
  --port N                       Bind port. Default: 8000
  --cors                         Add Access-Control-Allow-* headers for browser JS clients.
  --trace FILE                   Write prompts, cache decisions, output, and tool calls.
Endpoints: /v1/chat/completions, /v1/responses, /v1/completions, and /v1/messages.
Model endpoint aliases include deepseek-v4-flash and deepseek-v4-pro; both serve the loaded GGUF.

Disk KV Cache
  --kv-disk-dir DIR              Enable disk KV checkpoints in DIR.
  --kv-disk-space-mb N           Disk budget. Default when enabled: 4096
  --kv-cache-min-tokens N        Do not save/load checkpoints shorter than N. Default: 512
  --kv-cache-cold-max-tokens N   Save cold first prompts up to N tokens. 0 disables. Default: 30000
  --kv-cache-continued-interval-tokens N
      Save aligned continued frontiers. 0 disables. Default: 10000
  --kv-cache-boundary-trim-tokens N
      Trim tail tokens for cold boundary saves. Default: 32
  --kv-cache-boundary-align-tokens N
      Align cold boundary saves to this multiple. Default: 2048
  --kv-cache-reject-different-quant
      Reject checkpoints written with different routed-expert quantization.
  --disable-exact-dsml-tool-replay
      Disable exact sampled DSML tool replay map.
  --tool-memory-max-ids N        Exact tool-call IDs kept in RAM. Default: 100000

More Info
    Runtime full info:         --help runtime
    Distributed inference:     --help distributed
    Steering full info:        --help steering
    HTTP API:                  --help api
    Disk KV cache:             --help kv-cache
    Thinking behavior:         --help thinking

Examples
  local API                      ./ds4-server --ctx 100000 --kv-disk-dir ~/.ds4/server-kv --kv-disk-space-mb 8192
  curl                           curl http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/models
